title: MISO Generation Outages Estimated JSON API
description:
This dataset contains daily 30-day lookback data from MISO on generator outags. Each day, MISO publishes their current estimated outage data for the previous 30 days. This data may update throughout the 30-day lookback, so for the last published value for a partiuclar day use the maximum publish date.

Outage data in this dataset is available by the region and type of outage and represents MISO's forecast of outages for the peak hour in a given day. MISO derives outage data from information filed with the Control Room Operations Window (CROW) system.

The regions are:
* North
* Central
* South
* MISO

The outage types included are:
* Forced
* Derate
* Planned
* Unplanned


This dataset is derived from MISO's *Multiday Operating Margin Forecast Report*.
